---
title: "User Guide"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## User Guide PDF

The final user guide is delivered as a PDF document. Read it in the embedded viewer below, open it in a separate tab with the browser's PDF controls, or download it directly.

[Open User Guide PDF in a New Tab](pdf/App_UserGuide_20260405.pdf){target="_blank" .btn-home-primary}
[Download User Guide PDF](pdf/App_UserGuide_20260405.pdf){download="App_UserGuide_20260405.pdf" .btn-home-secondary}

::: {.pdf-frame-wrap}
<iframe
  src="pdf/App_UserGuide_20260405.pdf#view=FitH"
  title="User Guide PDF"
  class="pdf-frame">
</iframe>
:::
